title: hieracium solocinum
intro: Hieracium sololicinum, also known as Devil's bit, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to expel intestinal parasites and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium sololicinum include its ability to aid in the digestion, relieve symptoms of fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Hieracium sololicinum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
